trustedSourceSummary: No official consumer documents were found in the last 60 days, so the latest available official sources from 2025-2026 were used. Organizations used: Altroconsumo. Altroconsumo’s December 2025 tests identify Tre Marie as the top‑rated pandoro and Conad as the best purchase; the evidence is from 2025‑12‑05, so it is older than 60 days.
